reason: Confirmed division-by-zero bug: `    return total / len(nums)` is present at RIGHT line 5 and will raise ZeroDivisionError when nums is empty.
comment: Division by zero when `nums` is empty: `len(nums)` is used as divisor with no guard. `average([])` raises `ZeroDivisionError`. Add an early return or raise a descriptive error for the empty-list case.
